distinctive_elements: Additional background music included in Famicom version compared to arcade

sources_used: Wikipedia - B-Wings (composer credit: Azusa Hara for Famicom)
The Cutting Room Floor - B-Wings (NES) (debug mode and level select documentation)
notes: T3 tier data - empirical/qualitative only. No documented tempo, key, chord progression, time signature, or detailed SFX characteristics found in available sources. Sources confirm composer and that Famicom version had new background music added versus arcade version, but no musical analysis data is provided in documentation.
